metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_540
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig. 8; MAGI3 is concentrated on IPL sublaminae 2 and 4 were cone bipolar axons made synapses onto amacrine or ganglion dendrites. Hovewer the images do not tell us if MAGI3 is a presynaptic or a postsynaptic protein. The data only indicate that MAGI3 is a "synaptic" protein.

Literal
"Double-label immunohistochemistry revealed that MAGI-2 and MAGI-3-rich
sublaminae are nonoverlapping, indicating that MAGI-2 and MAGI-3 are present in distinct synapses.Confocal images suggested that MAGI-2 and Sidekick-2 were present in the same synaptic puncta, as were MAGI-3 and Dscam (Fig. 8b,c,)". Experimental description: Literal from M&M
"Retinal cells were dissociated from embryonic chicks at E16."

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
